extraction.one_line_summary: MOHORIČ attacked with 700m remaining on wet circuit finish, bridged to BETANCUR breakaway remnants, soloed to victory over closing sprint group
tactical_patterns: MOHORIČ exploited wet circuit finale by attacking pre-sprint at 700m, negating pure sprinter advantage with power play
VIVIANI caught behind split on approach, forced expensive chase effort that likely compromised later positioning in finale
Lotto-FixAll drove splits aggressively in wet conditions but failed to convert organizational advantage into sprint result
BETANCUR's late solo bridge attempt from breakaway survived until final 700m, disrupting sprint train assembly behind

rider_signals.MOHORIČ Matej: positive: demonstrated exceptional finishing power on wet circuits, attacking before organized sprints form rather than relying on leadout
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: led out finale but lacked final acceleration to follow when MOHORIČ launched decisive 700m attack
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: caught behind peloton split on wet approach, wasted energy rejoining group instead of conserving for sprint
rider_signals.BETANCUR Carlos: positive: bridged solo from breakaway to survive until final 700m, showing sustained power over circuit finale
rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: neutral: attempted intermediate points grab but tactical gamble yielded no stage result benefit
rider_signals.MOSCA Jacopo: neutral: exceeded 500km cumulative breakaway distance at Giro, won intermediate sprint but caught before finale
